---
title: "R_DM_2"
output: html_document
---

Library importation

```{r}
library(haven)
library(dplyr)
```


# Data visualisation

```{r}
file = "data/DM_Subject_2_Data.dta"
df <- read_dta(file)

head(df)
```

# Part 1


```{r}

# filtering the dataframe to keep only observation with wage
df_wage <- df %>% 
  filter(!is.na(salmensuel))


```


`r nrow(df_wage)` observations over `r nrow(df)` have a mensual salary indicated. Indeed the wage is only available in the first and last quarter of the dataframe for employed individuals.


```{r}

```
